headline: Duke Energy announces dividend payments to shareholders
summary: Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK) today declared a quarterly cash dividend on its common stock of $1.065 per share. This dividend is payable on June 16, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on May 15, 2026.

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on Duke Energy Stock?
summary: Although Duke Energy has lagged the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain moderately upbeat about the stock’s long-term outlook.
